subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God, the messenger of the favours of the One True God hath arrived with news of the success of the beloved of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله پیک عنایت حضرت احدیت رسید و خبر موفقیت احبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @compassion; kindness, @wisdom [hikmat]
